name: IT Trends for 1999 -- Internal Kastner/Logan Analysis
description: This internal Aberdeen Group memo captures a dialogue between John R. Logan (JRL) and Peter S. Kastner (PK) on IT trends for 1999. Logan proposes 8 trends and Kastner responds with critiques, refinements, and additional topics. Key themes include Y2K preparedness, Windows 2000 adoption risk, Intel PC refresh cycle, EAI approaches, ISP market evolution, application integration, e-commerce development methodologies, and security. Kastner also adds three original trend topics: security ownership, objects in 1999, and ISP utility computing.

creator.name: Peter S. Kastner; John R. Logan / Aberdeen Group
